title: Rork (individual)
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type= |image=[[File:Mr_rork.jpg]] |name=Rork |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]][[Star Wars (1977) 24|''Star Wars'' (1977) 24]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Red]] |feathers= |eyes= |skin=Light |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Captain Quasar! All four Merson ships have just swung in our direction!"
"Mr. Rork is correct. Unless I miss my guess, those ships are preparing to attack.|Rork and Obi-Wan Kenobi|}} '''Rork''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as a crewman on [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Quasar (Human)|Quasar's]] [[pleasure cruiser]] during the era of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Rork was aboard Quasar's [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] during a journey through the [[Merson asteroid belt]] when they noticed [[Merson pirates/Legends|Merson pirate]] [[Starship/Legends|vessels]] tailing their ship. Unschooled in the ways of war and not certain what to do, Quasar dispatched Rork to summon [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], who was traveling aboard the ship, as the captain wanted his counsel. Before long, the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] ships attacked the pleasure cruiser, and Quasar turned over command of his ship to Kenobi. The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] then directed Rork on when to fire the cruiser's [[energy cannon]]s in the ensuing battle, and his guidance proved instrumental to victory. ==Behind the scenes== Rork made his first and only appearance in the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] continuity in [[Star Wars (1977) 24|''Star Wars'' (1977) 24]], written by [[Mary Jo Duffy]] and released in [[1979]]. Rork was illustrated by [[Carmine Infantino]]. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars (1977) 24|''Star Wars'' (1977) 24]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 24}} {{1st}} {{Flash}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]]
